data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimizes decision time by creating a simple, streamlined interface.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizes target sizes and distances to enhance user interaction speed.

data.title: Pareto Principle (80/20 rule)
data.description: Focuses on the most impactful features that users often interact with.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Designs consistent with user expectations based on common experiences.

data.title: Law of Prägnanz
data.description: Presents information as simply as possible for effortless perception.
